description: Add 'collaborative_editing' feature flag to DEFAULT_BOOLEAN_FLAGS with default value false
Add v3 collab packages to server/package.json: @tiptap/extension-collaboration@^3.12.0, @tiptap/extension-collaboration-caret@^3.0.0, @tiptap/y-tiptap@^3.0.2
Create CollaborativeEditor component in packages/documents/src/components/ that initializes TipTap with Collaboration + CollaborationCaret extensions bound to a Y.js document via @tiptap/y-tiptap
CollaborativeEditor connects to Hocuspocus using HocuspocusProvider with room name format 'document:<tenant>:<documentId>'
CollaborativeEditor includes existing EditorToolbar (BubbleMenu) with all formatting options from PR #1898
Collaboration cursors display user name and distinct color via awareness protocol
Presence bar component above editor showing avatars/names of all connected users
Connection status indicator component (connected / syncing / disconnected)
Auto-save status indicator replacing manual save button ('All changes saved' / 'Saving...' / 'Offline')
Markdown paste handling works in collaborative mode (same detection + conversion as current DocumentEditor)
Add onConnect hook to Hocuspocus server.js that validates tenant segment in document room names matches connecting user's tenant
Hocuspocus onConnect allows non-document rooms (notifications:*) to pass through unchanged
Content persists to Hocuspocus PostgreSQL database via existing Database extension
Create server action syncCollabSnapshot(documentId) that reads Y.js state, converts to TipTap JSON, writes to document_block_content
Create /msp/collab-test/page.tsx route gated by collaborative_editing feature flag — shows 'Feature not available' when disabled
Test page: 'Create New Document' button that creates a document via createBlockDocument and opens it in the collaborative editor
Test page: URL parameter ?doc=<documentId> opens an existing document directly in the collaborative editor
Test page: 'Snapshot to DB' button that calls syncCollabSnapshot and shows success/error feedback
Test page: debug panel (collapsible) showing connection status, connected users count, room name, Y.js sync state
CollaborativeEditor initializes Y.js document from existing document_block_content.block_data when the Hocuspocus document is empty (first connection for a document)
Export CollaborativeEditor from packages/documents/src/components/index.ts
CollaborativeEditor CSS: cursor label styling, presence bar styling, status indicator styling — using existing design tokens (--color-* CSS vars)
CollaborativeEditor includes Emoticon extension from @alga-psa/ui/editor for text-emoticon-to-emoji conversion
CollaborativeEditor includes Link extension with config matching DocumentEditor: openOnClick: false, autolink: true, linkOnPaste: true, target: '_blank', rel: 'noopener noreferrer'

EmojiSuggestionExtension: ProseMirror plugin detects ':query' (2+ chars) and emits state changes; EmojiSuggestionPopup: React component shows grid of matching emoji from emoji-mart with keyboard navigation (arrows, Enter, Escape)
CollaborativeEditor integrates EmojiSuggestionExtension and EmojiSuggestionPopup for ':query' emoji picker grid
MentionNode: Tiptap Node extension (inline, atom) that renders mention badges with userId/username/displayName attributes, matching BlockNote Mention styling

MentionSuggestionExtension: ProseMirror plugin detects '@query' and emits state changes; MentionSuggestionPopup: React component shows searchable user list with @everyone option, keyboard navigation (arrows, Enter/Tab, Escape)
CollaborativeEditor accepts optional searchMentions prop and integrates MentionNode + MentionSuggestionExtension + MentionSuggestionPopup; Collab test page passes searchUsersForMentions
yjs-config.ts getHocuspocusUrl() derives WebSocket URL from window.location in browser (wss://<host>/hocuspocus), falls back to NEXT_PUBLIC_HOCUSPOCUS_URL env var or ws://localhost:1234

RichTextViewer: sanitizeBlocks() validates block types and coerces non-string .text fields; extractTextFromProseMirror() handles Tiptap JSON {type:'doc'} format; RichTextErrorBoundary catches render crashes with plain-text fallback
TextEditor isTextContent guard checks typeof content.text === 'string' to prevent .trim() crash on non-string text fields in old documents

resolveEveryoneMention checks for @everyone once and does a single DB query instead of looping; mention handlers early-exit when no new mentions found; notifications created in parallel via Promise.all

EmojiSuggestion and MentionSuggestion exports added to @alga-psa/ui/editor index.ts (EmojiSuggestionExtension, EmojiSuggestionPopup, EmojiSuggestionState, MentionNode, MentionSuggestionExtension, MentionSuggestionPopup, MentionSuggestionState, MentionSuggestionUser)

Phase 2 cleanup: Audit and delete DocumentEditor.jsx, BlockEditor.jsx, and DocumentEditor.tsx after confirming zero remaining imports. Verify comments (TextEditor) and read-only display (RichTextViewer) are unaffected.
